title: In Situ Hybridization
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9dqkn","text":"Modified lightly from ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ag69e","text":"Determination of gene expression patterns using high-throughput RNA in situ hybridization to whole-mount Drosophila embryos","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3b39u","text":"Richard Weiszmann, Ann S Hammonds \u0026 Susan E Celniker","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1qbmt","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3r665","text":"doi:10.1038/nprot.2009.55","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Take 20-40 ul of embryos into each tube
Re-hydrate the embryos in 3:1 methanol:formaldehyde (2.5% (vol/vol)) in 1 PBS for 2 min.
Post-fix in formaldehyde (2.5% (vol/vol)) in 1x PBS for 10 min.
Rinse 6 in PBT.
Add the hybridization buffer without dextran sulfate into each tube
Incubate by shaking at 125 r.p.m. on the Gyrotory shaker for at least 1 h at room temperature to pre-hybridize the embryos.
Add 2 µl of the appropriate probe into each tube with dextran sulfate
Incubate at 55C by shaking at 125 r.p.m. on the Gyrotory shaker overnight.
Add 100 µl of wash buffer at room temperature.
Remove the hybridization buffer–wash buffer mix.
Rinse 2x with wash buffer.
Incubate 8x in the wash buffer at 55C by shaking for 45 min
Rinse in PBT.
Incubate in PBT at room temperature by shaking for 30 min.
Add PBT, goat serum (5% (vol/vol)) and anti-digoxigenin-AP Fab fragments (1:2,000 dilution), and incubate at room temperature by shaking for 2 h.
Rinse 2x with PBT.
Incubate 9x in PBT at room temperature by shaking for 10 min each.
Rinse 2x with the AP buffer.
Wash in the AP buffer at room temperature for 5 min.
Add the AP developing solution
Incubate by shaking in the dark at room temperature until desired color development is achieved (~75 min).
Rinse 6x in ethanol.
Rinse 2x in PBT.
Add 70% vol/vol glycerol PAUSE POINT Stained embryos can be stored at 4C for at least 1 year.
Check tubes under a low-power magnification microscope. Embryos are ready to be photographed.
Re-hydrate in 1:3 methanol:formaldehyde (2.5% (vol/vol)) in 1 PBS for 5 min.
During pre-hybridization, add 200 µL of hybridization buffer with dextran sulfate into a tube
Incubate in the wash buffer at 55C by shaking overnight.
Rinse 3 in PBT to stop the color reaction.
Remove the hybridization buffer without dextran sulfate from the embryo
Add hybridization buffer with dextran sulfate to embryos
creator: Peter Combs
